prompt: Create a photorealistic outdoor fashion portrait of an adult woman standing waist-up in a bright sunflower field on a sunny day, wearing a white deep V-neck one-piece swimsuit with thin shoulder straps and a wrap-style bodice. She has long chestnut-brown hair blowing gently in the wind, bare shoulders, soft natural skin tones, and a relaxed upright pose among tall yellow sunflowers. Place a large opaque square censor block over the center of her face, colored muted tan-brown, covering the facial features while leaving the hair, neck, shoulders, and outfit visible. Use warm summer daylight, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh sunflowers in the background, crisp focus on the subject and nearby foreground sunflower, natural editorial photography style, 85mm lens look, soft highlights, fresh green and golden color palette, vertical 4:5 composition.
